Name: BehaviorParam_PC
Description: Determines the behavior parameters used when triggering projectiles and attacks.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Used when calculating the ID for attack parameters. It is not used directly on the actual machine.

Fields.Name: Behavior Judgement ID
Fields.Description: Used when calculating the ID for attack parameters. This ID matches the action judgment ID entered in TAE.

Fields.Name: Reference ID Type
Fields.Description: Which param type to reference for attack behavior.

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Poise
Fields.Description: Set the amount of Poise consumed during action

Fields.Name: Reference ID
Fields.Description: ID of param to use for attack behavior. Param used determined by refType

Fields.Name: Particle Variation ID
Fields.Description: Offset applied to the particle ID invoked in the TAE event

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Stamina
Fields.Description: Set the amount of stamina consumed during action

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Energy
Fields.Description: Set the amount of energy consumed during action

Fields.Name: Action Cost: MP
Fields.Description: Set the amount of MP consumed during action

Fields.Name: SpEffect Category
Fields.Description: The SpEffect category this behavior belongs to

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Humanity
Fields.Description: Set the amount of humanity consumed during action

Fields.Name: Firing: Dummy Polygon Range Start ID
Fields.Description: The starting ID in a range of Dummy Polygons used for shooting.

Fields.Name: Firing: Dummy Polygon Range End ID
Fields.Description: The ending ID in a range of Dummy Polygons used for shooting.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Angle
Fields.Description: Specifies how far forward the projectile should be fired. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Angle Interval (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the interval at which to fire. (Y axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Elevation Angle (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Additional elevation angle from horizontal. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Consume Multiple Bullets when Firing Simultaneously
Fields.Description: Consumes bullets for several times when fired simultaneously

Fields.Name: Fire Sequentially even when Firing Simultaneously
Fields.Description: When firing sequentially using multiple dummy polys, are bullets fired at the same time considered to be fired sequentially?

Fields.Name: Apply Offset only to Guided Targets
Fields.Description: When OFF, offset is also applied to the shooting angle; when ON, offset is disabled.

Fields.Name: Firing: Launch Elevation Angle Interval (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the interval at which to fire.(X-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Angle Rotation (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Specifies how many times to rotate in the Z-axis direction when launching a projectile. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Angle Rotation Interval (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the interval at which to fire (Z-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Roll Angle (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Additional angle in drilling direction (Z axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Roll Angle Interval (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the interval at which to fire (Z-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Roll Angle - Random Max (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Upper limit of firing torsion angle random number (0 to 360)

Fields.Name: Firing: Target Offset (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Left and right offset of impact position. Shifts the target position left and right during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Firing: Target Offset (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: Vertical offset of impact position. Shifts the target position up and down during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Firing: Target Offset (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Front and rear offset of impact position. Shifts the target position forward and backward during firing and homing.

Fields.Name: Number of Shots
Fields.Description: Number of bullets produced per cartridge (emitter). Does not affect ammo consumption

Fields.Name: Number of Consecutive Shots
Fields.Description: Number of times to fire continuously. The total number of bullets fired is the number of simultaneous shots x the number of consecutive shots.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Capsule: Initial Roll Angle
Fields.Description: Rotation angle of horizontal capsule. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Consecutive Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: Number of seconds between shots when firing continuously

Fields.Name: Reload Time
Fields.Description: Interval between one shot and the next shot

Fields.Name: Curved Firing: Target Offset Range (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Forward and backward offset of the impact position for curved shots. Shifts the target position toward the front or back during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Curved Firing: Target Offset Range (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Left and right offset of the impact position for curved shots. Shifts the target position toward the front or back during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Is Target Position Automatically Offset
Fields.Description: Should you use automatic target position offset?

Fields.Name: Target Position Automatic Offset: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Reference dummy poly ID used in target position automatic offset

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Pulse Armor
Fields.Description: Set the amount of pulse armor consumed during action

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor: Recovery Delay Time Override
Fields.Description: Amount to override Pulse Armor recovery time (-1 means no override)

Fields.Name: Action Cost: Ammunition
Fields.Description: Number of ammunition consumed when an attack occurs

Fields.Name: Attack Recoil: Blur Accumulation
Fields.Description: Attack recoil blur accumulation amount

Fields.Name: Missle Lock: Lock Time
Fields.Description: Time to secondary lock. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Missile Lock: Max Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of missile locks

Fields.Name: Missle Lock: Firable Count
Fields.Description: If the lock count number is less than the specified value, firing will not be possible.

Fields.Name: HD Vibration on Hit
Fields.Description: Vibration ID for haptic feedback

Fields.Name: HD Vibration on Impact
Fields.Description: Impact vibration ID for haptic feedback

Fields.Name: HD Vibration Priority
Fields.Description: Playback priority for haptic feedback (0 is low priority, 10 is high priority)

Fields.Name: Shot Control: ID
Fields.Description: Shot Control parameter to use.

Fields.Name: Shot Control: Base Distance
Fields.Description: Diffusion reference distance

Fields.Name: Heat: Build-up (by Point)
Fields.Description: Heat value accumulated with each bullet

Fields.Name: Target Position Shot Control: ID
Fields.Description: Offset calculation for target position

Fields.Name: Charge Attack: Start Delay
Fields.Description: Delay time until charging starts after referring to action parameters. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Consecutive Firing: Ammunition Consumption Max Time
Fields.Description: Maximum time of bullets consumed by continuous consumption. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Consecutive Firing: Heat Accumulation Max Time
Fields.Description: Maximum amount of heat accumulated through continuous consumption. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Consecutive Firing: Heat Accumulation Max
Fields.Description: Maximum amount of heat accumulated through continuous consumption

Fields.Name: Lock Count: Add Time
Fields.Description: Missile lock count up time (lock time from 2nd lock). In seconds.
